steps.t: Sheep can be found grazing in the south-western corner of Pelennor Fields. You should find and return the sheep to Talfadan.
Sheep and Morgul Scouts can be found grazing in the south-western corner of Pelennor Fields. You should find and return the sheep to Talfadan as well …
Talfadan is at Pel Dúven. You should speak with Talfadan.
Turgon can be found at the South-gate of the Rammas. You should speak with Turgon.
